reasoning: DeepSeek has made remarkable progress recently with models like DeepSeek V3 and R1, but the top spot on Chatbot Arena is fiercely contested by well-funded US giants like OpenAI (GPT-4.5/GPT-5 expected in 2025), Anthropic (Claude 3.5 Opus or Claude 4), and Google (Gemini 2.0).
